steps.assistant_text: Uniform +1 t-ring residual (else-arm lbu onward: lbu t8->t9, ori t9->t0, mfc1 t1->t2, bc1fl annul-dup) cracked with the subsumed-mask 1-slot ring burn ON THE LOAD: ((*p) & 0xFFFF) | 2 — the u8-ranged mask range-folds to zero insns but consumes one ring slot before the lbu pop. Position is decisive: (x|2)&0xFFFF burns between lbu and ori (partial); masking the OTHER arm's &0xFFFD statement burns before that arm's andi (regress). Also removed permuter noise (dummy label, 5x empty if(1)) — byte-neutral.
